name: Crab Supreme #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook mushrooms and onions in butter until tender.
2. Blend in flour and thyme.
3. Stir in cream or milk and cook constantly until thick and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Add wine. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Stir in crab meat.
7. Spoon into crab shells or ramekins.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake at 375 degrees for 15 minutes until top is slightly browned.
